import io

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    match string.parse_int(string.trim(line))
    when Some(n)
      mut i = n
      while i >= 0
        println(i)
        i = i - 1
      end
      println("done")
    when None
      ()
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

import string
